Purpose
The SP pass no longer requires +rms_norm custom ops to be enabled. PR #27126 introduced MatcherRMSNorm which matches both custom op and native rms_norm implementations, making the forcing unnecessary.
Removing it allows native rms_norm to trace through inductor, which should improve performa

Fixes #35394.
Problem
check_interleaved_audio_video used a simple range-overlap check to detect the use_audio_in_video=True case. This produces a false positive when multiple non-interleaved requests are batched together: audio tokens from request N fall between video tokens of request N and request

Kimi reasoning parser is currently based off Deepseeks. However, Kimi may start a tool call without using a think end token.

This PR addresses the FusedMoE.forward_impl_chunked in a mor

vllm.title: [Misc] Clean up ResponsesRequest model validators
vllm.author: umut-polat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Two related cleanups for ResponsesRequest model validators:
1. Add missing @classmethod decorators
The four @model_validator(mode="before") methods were missing @classmethod, unlike all other validators in the completion and chat_completion protocols.
2. Use VLLMValidationError consistently

The main purpose of this PR is to establish the structure, rather than comprehensively supporting models.

vllm.title: [ROCm][Quantization] Add Composable Kernel (CK) backend support for M…
vllm.author: dllehr-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
…XFP4 MoE
This commit introduces support for the Composable Kernel (CK) backend for MXFP4-quantized Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models on ROCm via the Aiter library. This provides an optimized inference path for A16W4 (FP16 activations, FP4 weights) MoE workloads on AMD GPUs.
Key changes:
vllm/_aiter_o

vllm.title: [MTP] Validate that MTP weights are actually loaded
vllm.author: MatthewBonanni
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
When loading an MTP-compatible model, validate that MTP weights were actually loaded.
For example, lukealonso/GLM-5-NVFP4 is an NVFP4-quantized version of GLM-5 which does not include MTP weights. On main, if you serve this model with MTP, it will load garbage from uninitialized memory (torc

In collaboration with @tlrmchlsmth, we rebased the PR on top of latest vLLM main, resolved all conflicts and remaining issues to help get it ready

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Propagate compilation_time from workers to main process for TP>1
vllm.author: huydhn
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This is to fix the issue where vllm bench startup returns 0 for cold and warm compilation time. With tensor_parallel_size > 1, compilation happens in worker processes but compilation_time was only tracked in each worker's local config object, leaving the main process's compilation_config.com

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Move chat completion response_format validation to Pydantic model_validator
vllm.author: umut-polat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Apply the same Pydantic validation pattern from #35456 (completions endpoint, merged) to the chat completions endpoint.
The /v1/chat/completions endpoint has the same issue: when response_format type is json_schema but the json_schema field is missing, an assert fires during to_sampling_para

vllm.title: [EPLB] Enforce sync eplb for NCCL-based all2all backend
vllm.author: ilmarkov
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
To avoid hangs with all2all NCCL-based backends (AllGather/ScatterReduce or Naive) we enforce using sync EPLB.
The hang are caused by overlapping NCCL kernels in main thread with communication in async EPLB thread.
pytorch issue: pytorch/pytorch#175145
Test Plan
Gsm8k validation
vllm serve Q

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Adding infiniband mappings for moriio tests
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Follow-up on the Moriio tests from: #34923
Description
Exposing infiniband via our run-amd-tests.sh script.
Discussion
The RIXL wheel bundles UCX built with --with-verbs, but UCX's verbs transport dynamically loads system RDMA libraries at runtime:

Without ibverbs-providers plugins (e.g. libmlx5.so

vllm.title: [ROCm] Derive device capability from GCN arch string without CUDA init
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Follow-up to #34652.
Problem
RocmPlatform.get_device_capability() calls torch.cuda.get_device_capability(), which initializes CUDA. When vLLM runs inside a Ray actor with num_gpus=0 (e.g. the RLHF weight-syncing example), CUDA init fails with RuntimeError: No HIP GPUs are available because Ray hasn'

vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Expand ROCm CI coverage by exposing tests to the amdproduction mirror hardware signal, and fix a heap corruption bug in GPU memory queries that was causing flaky failures on MI325.
AMD production CI coverage
